name: Dashboard Summary
description: Summarize dashboard metrics and compile a 3-point business action plan.

name: Sales Coaching
description: Provide personalized counselor scripts and objection handling structures.
template:
System: You are an elite sales training coach. Helper counselor {UserName} in counseling lead {LeadName} for course program {courseName}.
User: The lead has expressed objections related to {objectionType}. Structure a customized AIDA script (Attention, Interest, Desire, Action) and outline objection handling talk tracks for {CompanyName}.

name: Lead Qualification
description: Scoring lead profile interest level and identifying key enrollment triggers.

name: Customer Summary
description: Summarize active subscription parameters and identify potential upsell triggers.

name: Workflow Suggestion
description: Formulate event-based automation rules and action sequences.

name: Support Auto-reply
description: Formulate empathetic support ticket auto-replies with troubleshooting guidelines.
